patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/server.py b/asgiref/server.py
index 131ea43..7d43f9c 100644
--- a/asgiref/server.py
+++ b/asgiref/server.py
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ class StatelessServer:
             self.application_instances[scope_id]["last_used"] = time.time()
             return self.application_instances[scope_id]["input_queue"]
         # See if we need to delete an old one
-        while len(self.application_instances) > self.max_applications:
+        while len(self.application_instances) >= self.max_applications:
             self.delete_oldest_application_instance()
         # Make an instance of the application
         input_queue = asyncio.Queue()
@@ -158,7 +158,6 @@ class StatelessServer:
                     try:
                         del self.application_instances[scope_id]
                     except KeyError:
-                        # Exception handling might have already got here before us. That's fine.
                         pass
 
     async def application_exception(self, exception, application_details):
@@ -170,4 +169,4 @@ class StatelessServer:
             exception,
             "".join(traceback.format_tb(exception.__traceback__)),
             f"  {exception}",
-        )
+        )
\ No newline at end of file
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..7f6ad6c 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -100,15 +100,9 @@ class ThreadSensitiveContext:
 
         return self
 
-    async def __aexit__(self, exc, value, tb):
-        if not self.token:
-            return
-
-        executor = SyncToAsync.context_to_thread_executor.pop(self, None)
-        if executor:
-            executor.shutdown()
-        SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
-
+    async def __aexit__ (self, exc, value, tb) :
+        if self.token is not None:
+            SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
 
 class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
